title: lomaria rinconii
intro: Lomaria rinconii, also known as the Rincón fern, is a species of fern native to the Pacific coast of North America. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lomaria rinconii include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe coughs, and alleviate congestion. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
